title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 46.
content:
There was an Old Man of the North,
    Who fell into a basin of broth;
    But a laudable cook,
    Fished him out with a hook,
    Which saved that Old Man of the North.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 46."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
